chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1540 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.368/2025 3. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Abdul Ghaffar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< After arguing the matter at some length, Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has filed Departmental Appeal before the Secretary, School Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, but same has not been decided yet, therefore, he seeks disposal of this petition and submits that directions may be issued to the Secretary, School Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh to decide the Departmental Appeal of the Petitioner within a shortest period of time. Learned Addl. AG while raising objection as to the maintainability of this petition submits that the Departmental Appeal of the petitioner will be decided within a shortest possible time. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with pending application with directions to the Secretary, School Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh to decide the Departmental Appeal of the petitioner (if pending) within 60 (sixty) days from the date of this order. Judge Judge ARBROHI
